title: New loading indicator across buttons + spinners

bullets.text: Loading states now show an Echo Ring — concentric diamond ripple — in place of the old ring spinner and the "Saving..." text. Save buttons keep their label, the loader just appears beside it
Modals and the lightbox no longer get cut off by the address bar on mobile Safari — every screen now sizes to what you can actually see
The Actions card in the lightbox right panel no longer looks cut off — same rounded edges and border as the card above it
Gallery view becomes a pannable canvas — drag or trackpad-swipe through your screenshots like a wallpaper
Pan further → next 50 screenshots load in the direction you're heading. A subtle marker tells you content is arriving
Density toggle (A / M / C) zooms cells live — bigger for focus, smaller for breadth
Turn it off any time from Account menu → Canvas view; you'll fall back to the classic gallery

title: Typing key feedback while you edit

bullets.text: Editing a screenshot name shows the key you just pressed at the bottom of the screen, with a soft mechanical click
Toggle it on or off any time from Account menu → Typing key feedback
More breathing room above and below the image inside the lightbox
Image loads instantly with a chunky preview instead of a tiny dot in the centre
Editing the Web preset on a screenshot now saves correctly — no more silent revert on reopen
Paste-from-clipboard now sits as a compact text link below a shorter drop zone — same iOS Universal Clipboard support, less screen real estate

title: Paste from clipboard + UI Element tagging

bullets.text: Quick Upload has a Paste pill next to the drop zone — click it and Cmd/Ctrl+V to drop in images, works on iOS via long-press too
Annotate an area then flip "Tag as UI Element" to add it to the UI Element filter taxonomy — no Studio access needed
New UI Element filter in the toolbar, plus a green "[📦 N]" badge on cards that have tagged UI elements

title: Mobile header, PWA install & filter chip strip

bullets.text: Header on mobile shrinks — identity pill collapses to a single letter, Settings moves into the dropdown, no more overlap
Real app icon when you Add to Home Screen on iPhone — dark boot screen, no more white flash on launch
Selected filter chips now show as a row below the toolbar with one-click remove + Clear all
App-update toast moved to top-right on desktop so it stops overlapping the magnified dock
Click the star in the header to see what shipped recently — release notes right inside the app
When a new build deploys, a toast appears so you can refresh and pick up the latest
Labelling Studio icon now matches the AI theme — sparkles instead of tags

title: Saved animation, Copy morph & Videos overhaul

bullets.text: Bookmarks is now "Saved" — and you'll see screens fly into the Saved tab when you stash them
Copying a share link gives you a clear green checkmark instead of a silent click
Videos load instantly: see who posted and read the excerpt before deciding to load the full embed
Speed through the lightbox with single keys — E edit · D delete · C crop · B save · A annotate
Jump anywhere in the app with C / V / L / I / S, or hit U to start a quick upload
Fine-tune crops with arrow keys — hold Shift for bigger jumps
Pick search results without touching the mouse: arrow through and hit Enter
Your catalogue no longer comes up empty after login — group filters now ignore casing
Share links you paste in Slack or X show a proper preview card

title: Group detail pages, login backdrop & toolbar refinements

bullets.text: Every group has its own page at /g/<key> — a tight grid of every screen, sized for your viewport
Click a group icon on the login screen to land straight in that group after sign-in
Browse flows from a chip strip below the toolbar — quicker than opening the dropdown
Groups without a category land in "Other" instead of muddying "Untagged"

title: Role system, Marketing Bucket & capability-aware UI

bullets.text: Roles replace the admin / non-admin split — every member gets exactly the capabilities they need
Mint a passcode for a teammate and pick their role in the same step
Marketing uploads now flow into a "Marketing Bucket" group, ready for an admin to promote
